Test Description: Verify homepage loads successfully
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/
2. Wait for page to load
3. Verify page displayed

Test Description: Verify site logo 'simple.' is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Check top left area
2. Verify logo 'simple.' is visible

Test Description: Verify sidebar menu contains all items
Test Steps:
1. Check left sidebar
2. Verify menu items: Home, Catalog, Blog, About Us, Wish list, Refer a friend

Test Description: Verify top navigation bar elements
Test Steps:
1. Check top bar
2. Verify: Search, About Us, Log In, Sign up, My Cart, Check Out

Test Description: Verify search field and button exist
Test Steps:
1. Check top bar
2. Locate search input field
3. Locate search submit button

Test Description: Verify social media links in sidebar
Test Steps:
1. Scroll sidebar
2. Check for icons: Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Pinterest, RSS

Test Description: Verify products displayed in grid format
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to product section
2. Verify products shown in grid layout
3. Check each product has image, title, price

Test Description: Verify footer contains required information
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to bottom
2. Check for footer links: Search, About Us
3. Check for payment icons

Test Description: Verify catalog page displays all products
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Catalog' in sidebar
2. Wait for page load
3. Verify product grid

Test Description: Verify breadcrumb navigation on catalog page
Test Steps:
1. Check top of page
2. Verify breadcrumb: Home > Products

Test Description: Verify all product images load correctly
Test Steps:
1. Check each product card
2. Verify images are not broken
3. Check image clarity

Test Description: Verify product titles are visible
Test Steps:
1. Check each product card
2. Verify product names displayed clearly

Test Description: Verify prices are shown in correct format
Test Steps:
1. Check product cards
2. Verify price format (currency symbol + amount)

Test Description: Verify 'SOLD OUT' badge on unavailable products
Test Steps:
1. Find Brown Shades product
2. Check for 'SOLD OUT' badge

Test Description: Verify product detail page loads when product clicked
Test Steps:
1. Click on any product
2. Wait for page load
3. Verify PDP displays

Test Description: Verify product image on detail page
Test Steps:
1. Check product image section
2. Verify image is large and clear

Test Description: Verify product title on detail page
Test Steps:
1. Check product title
2. Verify it matches selected product

Test Description: Verify price display on PDP
Test Steps:
1. Locate price
2. Verify format and amount

Test Description: Verify product description exists
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to description section
2. Verify description text is present

Test Description: Verify size selector dropdown exists
Test Steps:
1. Locate size selector
2. Verify it's a dropdown menu
3. Check for size options

Test Description: Verify color selector dropdown exists
Test Steps:
1. Locate color selector
2. Verify dropdown menu
3. Check color options

Test Description: Verify 'Add to Cart' button is visible
Test Steps:
1. Locate Add to Cart button
2. Verify button text and visibility

Test Description: Verify breadcrumb navigation on PDP
Test Steps:
1. Check top of page
2. Verify breadcrumb trail

Test Description: Verify shopping cart page structure
Test Steps:
1. Click 'My Cart'
2. Verify cart page displays
3. Check layout elements

Test Description: Verify product details in cart
Test Steps:
1. Check cart items
2. Verify: image, title, variant, price, quantity

Test Description: Verify quantity field is editable
Test Steps:
1. Locate quantity input field
2. Verify it's a text input
3. Check if editable

Test Description: Verify remove (X) button exists for each item
Test Steps:
1. Check each cart line item
2. Verify X/remove icon is present

Test Description: Verify UPDATE button is present
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to cart buttons
2. Locate UPDATE button
3. Verify visibility

Test Description: Verify CHECK OUT button exists
Test Steps:
1. Locate checkout button
2. Verify text and styling

Test Description: Verify order notes textarea exists
Test Steps:
1. Locate 'Add a note to your order' section
2. Verify textarea present

Test Description: Verify subtotal is calculated and shown
Test Steps:
1. Locate subtotal section
2. Verify amount displayed

Test Description: Verify checkout page displays
Test Steps:
1. Click CHECK OUT button
2. Wait for page load
3. Verify checkout page

Test Description: Verify contact information field exists
Test Steps:
1. Locate contact section
2. Verify Email or Phone field

Test Description: Verify all shipping address fields present
Test Steps:
1. Check shipping section
2. Verify fields: First Name, Last Name, Address, City, Country, State, ZIP

Test Description: Verify order summary sidebar
Test Steps:
1. Check right sidebar
2. Verify product list, subtotal, shipping, tax

Test Description: Verify continue/submit button exists
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to bottom
2. Locate continue to shipping button

Test Description: Verify login page has required fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Log In'
2. Verify Email field
3. Verify Password field
4. Verify Sign In button

Test Description: Verify 'Forgot your password?' link exists
Test Steps:
1. Check for forgot password link
2. Verify clickability

Test Description: Verify guest checkout option on login page
Test Steps:
1. Check for guest option
2. Verify 'Continue as Guest' text/button

Test Description: Verify registration page has all required fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Sign up'
2. Verify fields: First Name, Last Name, Email, Password
3. Verify Create button

Test Description: Verify cart item count updates in real-time
Test Steps:
1. Check 'My Cart' text in header
2. Verify it shows '(X)' where X is item count
3. Add item to cart
4. Verify count increases

Test Description: Verify copyright text exists in footer
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to footer
2. Check for copyright text
3. Verify year is correct

Test Description: Verify 'Shopping Cart by Shopify' link in footer
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to footer
2. Look for Shopify branding link
3. Verify link text

Test Description: Verify 'Continue Shopping' link exists on cart page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Look for 'Continue Shopping' link
3. Verify visibility

Test Description: Verify line item total display (Price × Qty)
Test Steps:
1. Add product to cart
2. Check line item shows: Price × Quantity = Line Total

Test Description: Verify message displayed when cart is empty
Test Steps:
1. Ensure cart has no items
2. Navigate to cart page
3. Check for empty cart message

Test Description: Verify RSS icon exists and is clickable
Test Steps:
1. Locate RSS icon in sidebar
2. Verify icon is visible
3. Check it's a clickable link

Test Description: Verify blog page displays correctly
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Blog' in sidebar
2. Verify page loads
3. Check for blog posts list
